acholi.metallic_fm_bell_tone: Dwon pa FM bell me nyonyo
acholi.barry_harris_1929_2021_codified_bebop_: Barry Harris (1929-2021) oketo cik pa harmony me bebop. Kit tic mere tiyo ki 6th chords ka ma tiyo ki 7ths dok medo diminished passing chords i kin degree pa scale wek dwon owot maber.
acholi.attack_time_to_reach_full_volume_decay: Attack: cawa me o i volume ma opong. Decay: cawa me lorre i sustain. Sustain: level pa volume ma imako. Release: cawa me too woko ka iweko key.
acholi.a_scale_is_an_ordered_set_of_pitches_m: Scale obedo cok pa pitches ma oyubu maber. Modes gin lokke pa scale ma cakke ki i degree mapatpat. Ngom acel acel yubo tam mapatpat.
acholi.chords_are_built_by_stacking_intervals: Kigero chords ki gruko intervals (3rds). Major tiyo ki major 3rd + minor 3rd. Minor lokogi. Extended chords medo 7ths, 9ths, ki mukene.
acholi.kicks_use_a_sine_oscillator_with_a_pit: Kicks tiyo ki sine oscillator ma tye ki pitch sweep. Snares riibo koko (ma otwodo) + tone body. Hi-hats tiyo ki high-pass filtered noise bursts.
acholi.4_4_4_quarter_note_beats_per_bar_most_: 4/4 = quarter-note beats 4 i bar acel (ma nen dwong). 3/4 = winyo me waltz. 6/8 = compound duple. 5/4 ki 7/8 yubo grooves ma pe rom, me lobo mukene.
acholi.keys_arranged_by_ascending_5ths_clockw: Kiyubo keys ki 5ths ma daño malo lubo cawa. Keys ma cok i kingi poko note 6 ki i 7. Cito lubo cawa medo sharps; ka pe lubo cawa medo flats.
acholi.every_musical_sound_contains_overtones: Dwon pa wer weng tye ki overtones malo pa fundamental. Teko gi ma poro yubo timbre — mano aye mumiyo trumpet winnye mapat ki flute i pitch acel.
acholi.an_interval_is_the_distance_between_tw: Interval obedo bor ma tye i kin pitches aryo, ki pimo i semitones. Frequency ratio yubo consonance (ratios mayot calo 3:2 winnye maber).
acholi.plays_chord_notes_one_at_a_time_in_seq: Goyo notes pa chord acel acel i yoo. Malo = ki piny cito malo, Piny = ki malo cito piny. Yubo patterns ma mol ki i chords ma pe wot.
acholi.a_filter_removes_frequencies_above_low: Filter kwanyo frequencies ma tye malo (lowpass), piny (highpass), onyo i alwora (bandpass) pa cutoff frequency. Resonance (Q) medo frequencies ma cok ki cutoff, yubo peak.
acholi.tremolo_periodic_volume_changes_amplit: Tremolo: alokaloka pa volume i cawa (amplitude modulation). Vibrato: alokaloka pa pitch i cawa (frequency modulation). Weng aryo kigwoko ki LFO (Low Frequency Oscillator).
acholi.discovered_in_1983_a_noise_burst_feeds: Kinongo i 1983. Noise burst donyo i delay line macek adada ma tye ki feedback. Delay time yubo pitch. Filter i feedback loop gwoko ryeny ki decay. Lubo plucked strings i yoo me kwena.
acholi.the_sequencer_is_a_composition_tool_ea: Sequencer obedo jami me yubo wer. Step acel acel cung pi subdivision pa beat. Row pa melody keto pitched notes, drums medo rythm. Musical notation nyuto gin ma iyubo.
acholi.notes_on_lines_and_spaces_represent_pi: Notes ma tye i lines ki spaces cung pi pitches. Kinyuto rumo ki kit pa note: whole (○), half (𝅗𝅥), quarter (♩), eighth (♪). Staff tye ki lines 5.
acholi.try_to_match_this_pattern: Tem me ribo ki pattern man!
acholi.equal_temperament_12_notes_per_octave_: Equal temperament: notes 12 i octave, ratio 2^(1/12). A4 = 440 Hz; A5 = 880 Hz. Well-Tempered Clavier pa Bach (1722) oyubo lobo me ye lok man. Note acel acel ma igoyo kany tye i grid meno.
acholi.scales_the_major_minor_modal_grammar: Scales — grammar pa major + minor + modal
acholi.major_w_w_h_w_w_w_h_minor_w_h_w_w_h_w_: Major: W-W-H-W-W-W-H. Minor: W-H-W-W-H-W-W. Modes 7 (Ionian, Dorian, Phrygian, Lydian, Mixolydian, Aeolian, Locrian) bino ki i loko interval pattern pa major scale.
acholi.triads_root_third_fifth_major_4_3_semi: Triads: root + third + fifth. Major (4+3 semitones), minor (3+4), diminished (3+3), augmented (4+4). 7th chords medo third mukene. Music pop = ~chords 6 ma dwokke; jazz tiyo ki extensions ki substitutions.
acholi.sustained_chord_textures_the_bed_under: Sustained chord textures — kitanda ma tye piny pa cok wer weng me cinema. Tem iv-V-i i minor, onyo i-VI-VII pi winyo pa Hans Zimmer. Drones i fifths gwoko wer classical me India ki cik pa bagpipe.
acholi.most_popular_music_sits_at_4_4_90_130_: Wer madwong ma jo maro tye i 4/4, 90-130 BPM. Hip-hop ~85-95, house 120-130, drum-and-bass ~170 (winyo me half-time). Kick i 1+3, snare i 2+4 = backbeat — mony pa rock + pop.
acholi.theory_the_math_behind_the_sound: Theory — kwan me namba ma tye i ngec pa dwon
acholi.pythagoras_500_bce_discovered_consonan: Pythagoras (~500 BCE) onongo consonance ki i integer frequency ratios: octave 2:1, fifth 3:2, fourth 4:3. Helmholtz omedo mano i 1862. Dwon = compression waves; wer = patterns ma waye me lwongo ni ber.
acholi.full_chord_grid_strum_plate_and_voice_: Chord grid ma opong, strum plate, ki voice presets
acholi.drag_across_strings_to_strum: Ywai i wi strings me strum!
acholi.frequency_modulation_fm_synthesis_uses: Frequency Modulation (FM) synthesis tiyo ki oscillator acel (modulator) me loko frequency pa mukene (carrier) oyot. Ratio pa modulator:carrier yubo harmonic content. Ratios mayot (1:1, 2:1, 3:1) yubo harmonic tones. Ratios matek yubo metallic, calo bell, onyo inharmonic sounds. Yamaha DX7 omiyo FM obedo lanek i 1983.
acholi.supersaw_stacks_multiple_sawtooth_osci: SuperSaw gruko sawtooth oscillators mapol ma odetune manok ki i kingi. Man yubo dwon madit, malac, ma ryeny — cim pa EDM, trance, ki pop me kombeddi. Voices mapol = matek to ento tiyo ki CPU mapol. Detuning gwoko kite ma voices tye ka bor i tuning — detune mapol = malac/calo chorus, manok = matidi/ma cung.
acholi.an_arpeggiator_plays_the_notes_of_a_ch: 🔬 Arpeggiator goyo notes pa chord acel acel i yoo. "Malo" cito ki piny cito malo, yubo teko ma daño. "Piny" lorre piny pi winyo me pii ma poto. Speed gwoko oyot (manok = oyot). Gate gwoko cawa ma note acel acel wer (100% = legato, 10% = staccato). Tem speed=100ms + octaves 4 + up pattern pi classic trance arp!
acholi.sing_speak_or_play_an_instrument_hear_: Wer, lok, onyo goo jami wer — winy effects i cawa ni!
acholi.how_effects_change_sound_waves: 🔬 Kit ma Effects Loko Sound Waves
acholi.removes_frequencies_above_lowpass_or_b: Kwanyo frequencies ma tye malo (lowpass) onyo piny (highpass) pa threshold. Calo umo dogi ki cing — frequencies ma malo lworo woko, dwon doko "macol" makato.
acholi.creates_echoes_by_copying_the_signal_a: Yubo echoes ki copyo signal ki goyo dok cen bang cawa manok. Feedback gwoko kwan pa echoes ma dwokke.
acholi.simulates_room_acoustics_by_creating_t: Lubo acoustics pa ot ki yubo echoes matino alip ma riibbe kacel. Ot matidi = reverb macek, katedral = reverb malac.
acholi.clips_the_waveform_peaks_turning_smoot: Ngolo peaks pa waveform, loko sine waves mayom doko kite matek, ma tye ki kona. Man medo harmonics manyen ma pe onongo i dwon me acakki.
acholi.duplicates_the_signal_with_a_slight_co: Copyo signal ki delay matidi ma loke jwijwi. Man lubo voices/jami wer mapol ma goyo kacel ki loke manok.
acholi.rapidly_varies_the_volume_up_and_down_: Loko volume malo ki piny oyot, yubo effect ma gwiny. Nen dwong i surf guitar ki wer organ.
acholi.use_headphones_when_monitoring_to_avoi: Ti ki headphones i kare me monitoring me gwokke ki feedback loops! Mic kato i effects weng ma tye malo (filter, delay, reverb, ki mukene) — yub gi wek iwiny kit ma acel acel loko dwoni onyo jami weri.
acholi.connect_your_microphone_to_run_your_vo: Riib microphone meri wek dwoni onyo jami weri okat i effects chain i cawa ni.
acholi.see_your_voice_as_a_waveform_frequency: Nen dwoni calo waveform + frequency spectrum. Winy kit ma filter, delay, reverb, distortion, ki chorus loko sound waves i kom.
acholi.touch_drag_x_pitch_y_filter_effect: Gud & ywai — X = pitch, Y = filter/effect
acholi.the_xy_pad_maps_your_finger_mouse_posi: XY pad keto ka ma lwet/mouse meri tye iye i musical parameters i cawa ni. X axis gwoko pitch (tung acam = piny, tung lacuc = malo). Y axis gwoko filter cutoff frequency (malo = ryeny, piny = macol). Man rom ki jami wer calo Korg Kaoss Pad, ma oloko live electronic music performance ki loko 2D gestures doko dwon.
acholi.xy_performance_pad_left_right_is_pitch: XY performance pad. Tung acam–lacuc obedo pitch, malo–piny obedo filter brightness. Ti ki arrow keys me wot ki goyo note; di Escape onyo Space me cung.
acholi.sequencer_drum_pads_notation_samples_m: Sequencer, drum pads, notation, samples & mukene →
acholi.click_cells_to_place_notes_visual_melo: Di cells me keto notes — visual melody editor
acholi.common_progressions_click_to_hear: Progressions ma nen dwong — di me winyo
acholi.chord_progressions_create_emotional_jo: Chord progressions yubo wot pa tam. Chord I (tonic) winnye calo 'gang.' Chord V (dominant) yubo can ma mito dwokke cen i I. Chord vi (relative minor) medo cwer cwiny onyo tut. Chord IV (subdominant) wot woko ki i gang mot. Kikwano ni progression I-V-vi-IV nen i kato 70% pa wer pop pien pote tam magi maber.
acholi.roman_numerals_i_ii_iii_iv_v_vi_vii_re: Namba Roman (I, ii, iii, IV, V, vi, vii°) cung pi degree pa scale. Coc madit = major chord. Coc matidi = minor chord.
acholi.add_melody_notes_in_the_grid_above: Med melody notes i grid ma malo ↑
acholi.click_melody_cells_in_the_grid_above_t: Di melody cells i grid ma malo me neno notation kany
acholi.click_challenge_me_to_practice_rhythm_: Di "Pek an!" me lubo rhythm patterns
acholi.upload_wav_mp3_files_for_custom_pads_s: Cwal WAV/MP3 files pi custom pads. Samples lworo woko ka kidwoko page.
acholi.chain_patterns_into_a_full_song: Riib patterns doko wer ma opong
acholi.add_current_pattern_as_a_section: Med pattern ma tye kombeddi calo section
acholi.add_current_as_section: + Med Ma Tye Kombeddi calo Section
acholi.create_a_drum_pattern_in_the_grid_abov: Yub drum pattern i grid ma malo, ka idi "+ Med Ma Tye Kombeddi calo Section" me cako gero wer.
acholi.sections_intro_verse_chorus_bridge_cho: Sections: Intro → Verse → Chorus → Bridge → Chorus → Outro
acholi.no_saved_beats_yet_create_a_pattern_an: Pud beats ma kigwoko pe. Yub pattern ka idi Gwok!
acholi.harmonypad_creates_warm_pure_tones_by_: HarmonyPad yubo warm, tones maleng ki riibo sine ki triangle waves. Yer voice, kwany chord ki i grid ma piny, ka istrum plate!
acholi.chord_grid_tap_to_select_space_to_stru: 🎶 Chord Grid — gud me yero, Space me strum
acholi.strum_plate_tap_or_drag_across: 🎸 Strum Plate — gud onyo ywai iwiye
acholi.hear_see_the_waveform_and_learn_the_st: Winy, nen waveform, ki puny tekwaro pa jami wer acel acel
acholi.this_is_how_different_instruments_get_: Man aye kit ma jami wer mapatpat nongo dwon gi mapat! Flute obedo harmonic 1 (sine) makato. Clarinet tye ki odd harmonics (1,3,5,7). Violin tye ki weng. Di me gero timbre meri!
acholi.karplus_strong_synthesis_creates_reali: Karplus-Strong synthesis yubo dwon me plucked string ma ada ki tic ki noise burst macek ma kicwalo i delay line ma tye ki filtered feedback. Yub brightness (rangi pa noise me acakki) ki damping (bor pa sustain) me yubo kit pa string.
acholi.identify_each_note_in_the_4_note_melod: Nong note acel acel i melody me note 4:
acholi.fundamental_heavy_gentle_highs_acousti: Fundamental mapek, highs mayom. Calo acoustic.
acholi.mid_heavy_without_fundamental_woody_cu: Mid mapek ma fundamental pe — calo yat/cuckoo flute.
acholi.almost_pure_fundamental_muffled_sub_li: Cok fundamental maleng — kiumo / calo sub.
acholi.roughly_equal_harmonics_full_natural_t: Harmonics cok rom — opong / timbre me kwena.
acholi.adjust_fundamental_mid_and_high_harmon: Yub levels pa harmonic me fundamental, mid, ki high. Widget poko dwon i acel me timbres abic mapatpat. Score pe, nyuto pe — sweep ki nen keken.
acholi.hypothesis_free_text_which_harmonic_le: Tam (coc ma leng): Harmonic level mene ma yubo "ryeny" ki "warm"?
acholi.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Mak sliders aryo motmot. Cwal acel. Nen.
acholi.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_t: Nong settings aryo ma yubo timbre acel. Ratios mene ma gipoko?
acholi.real_instruments_have_characteristic_s: Jami wer me ada tye ki spectra mapat. Rot pingo flute winnye mapat ki violin.
acholi.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Aniang — tit ki coc ma pa an
acholi.explain_how_harmonic_content_determine: Tit kit ma harmonic content yubo winyo pa timbre.
acholi.design_note_discrete_5_class_timbre_ma: Coc me design: timbre marker me class 5 mapat; acoustic fidelity score pe; nyuto pe — ki tam.
acholi.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: ki tic ki coc mayot me nino ki nino ki ukum macek, ma jargon pe
acholi.for_a_5th_grade_student_brief_and_frie: pi lakwan me class 5, macek ki me larem
acholi.for_a_student_who_already_knows_some_m: pi lakwan ma ongeyo mogo music theory
acholi.click_explain_for_the_ai_tutor_to_desc: Di "Tit" wek AI tutor otit gin ma view man pwonyo i level pa kwan ma iyero.
acholi.harmonic_series_why_instruments_sound_: 🎵 Harmonic Series — Pingo jami wer winnye mapat
